description: You are a robotics software engineer configuring a Human-Robot Interaction regression test in Webots. An AMR (Autonomous Mobile Robot) simulation is loaded, but the safety lidar is misconfigured and the pedestrian is stationary. Configure the DEF DOCTOR Pedestrian with a speed of 1.4 m/s and a trajectory using waypoints (5.0, 2.5, 0.0) and (5.0, -2.5, 0.0). Update the safety_lidar (located in HOSPITAL_ROBOT) to a Z translation of 0.4 meters, a field of view of 4.71 radians, and a horizontal resolution of 1080. Save the world to /home/ga/Desktop/amr_social_navigation.wbt.
